emails.shortDescription: Feature Instagram reel (@bigbluelogox). LogOX partnered with Timberwolf + expert advisory board to build the Summit. Dan-D-Lift lifts logs up to 275 lbs. First half: reel + brand story. Second half: product push.

emails.theme: Fuel Angle: Cut Your Own, Save Thousands
emails.shortDescription: What a typical household spent on heating fuel this winter ($1,390 avg per EIA) vs. cutting your own firewood. The 3-in-1 makes the work fast and easy on your back. Lead with dollar savings, close with the tool.
emails.notes: Educational hook, conversion close. Fresh 3-in-1 angle.

emails.shortDescription: 1 week out. Code DAD26, 15% off Sling and Hearth Bin. Fresh messaging, not a copy of May emails. Gift angle: tools he'll use every winter, not just once. Urgency: Father's Day is next Sunday.
emails.notes: Fresh messaging, not a copy of May emails.

emails.shortDescription: Limited quantity, back by popular demand. Handmade in USA by LT Wright master bladesmiths. A2 tool steel, Scandi grind, fire steel included. Proven revenue driver. Include real reviews. Position as Father's Day gift.
emails.notes: Good past revenue. Reviews from product page. Limited quantity scarcity angle.

emails.product: TimberOX Summit 30-Ton Log Splitter, LogOX 3-in-1 Forestry MultiTool, LogOX Forester Package
emails.shortDescription: Data-driven social proof: the three confirmed best sellers this month, ranked. TimberOX Summit 30-Ton Log Splitter ($5,995), LogOX 3-in-1 Forestry MultiTool ($289), LogOX Forester Package ($395).
emails.notes: Data-driven social proof. Best sellers provided by client Jun 15.
emails.creativeDirection: Data-driven social proof. Three best sellers ranked 1-3. Lifestyle hero banner, product renders in cards. Tiered rewards reminder ($150 free shipping, $250 free gifts, $500 trucker hat). Reviews labeled Fellow Woodsmen. LogOX brand colors.

emails.shortDescription: 2 days before Father's Day. Last chance for DAD26. This Sunday is Father's Day. This is the last time we're running this. Strongest urgency of the month.
emails.notes: Short, urgent, no fluff. Final push for DAD26.

emails.shortDescription: The attachment nobody knows about. Spear and move log rounds without bending. Aircraft aluminum. $49.95 entry point, easy conversion. Cross-sell to existing 3-in-1 owners.
emails.notes: Never had a dedicated email. Target existing 3-in-1 owners.

emails.shortDescription: Showcase the Chain Locker product line. Dedicated product spotlight to close the month.
emails.notes: Product spotlight. Close the month with Chain Locker.
